title: CAWEZ'S Mantle to Stratus
description: A vertical expansion to Minecraft adding 3 new dimensions both above and below the Overworld, with many sights to see and challenges to overcome.
body:
CAWEZ's Mantle to Stratus expands the vertically of your Minecraft world by adding 6 new dimensions: 3 below bedrock and 3 above build limit. To travel between dimensions, either build past y=320 or dig down to y=-64. Bedrock will be replaced with obsidian.

The Nether and the End are sandwiched between these new dimensions. Standard progression has not been changed, and the mod does not force itself on gameplay. It is however recommended that you disable Nether portals: this will enhance the interconnectedness of the dimensions.

 

The mod offers 15 new biomes, each with unique ressources. The main objective of this mod is to replace farming with exploring, and to turn Minecraft into a more 'hands on' experience.

In these lands, you will encounter new mobs, ores and ressources, which will allow you to craft iron/diamond tier tools and gear with unique interactions, as well as a few miscellaneous items that will improve quality of life.

CMS also offers 3 bosses with unique gimmicks, which can be challenged after conquering all dimensions. These bosses aren't the main focus of the mod and serve simply to add an extra challenge to players wanting more.

 

The mod is compatible with Immersive Portals' dimension stack. By default, CMS will provide its own logic for handling transitions, but will make use of loading screens.

The mod also provides a config file for modpack integration. It allows you to alter the height of vanilla dimensions and makes it possible to add modded dimensions to the stack.

 

Make sure to take a look at the gallery!
CMS + Immersive portals demo video

 

 

 

Disclaimer: this mod was made in part using MCreator. If you have a problem with that, feel free to rewrite it ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
